subcodes.first_line: Praise and thanksgiving befit the Dawning-Place of the Light of Divine Unity, Who hath bestowed the power of utterance and through it revealed the realms of remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مطلع نور احدیه را لایق و سزاست که قوه ناطقه بخشید و بان عوالم ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
